name: badge
title: Badge
description: Compact counter or notification dot for status and unread indicators.

consumption.cssSetup:
Import at your app entry point:
  import '@ds-mo/tokens/css';   // CSS custom properties (colors, dimensions, effects, typography)
  import '@ds-mo/ui/css';       // Component-level CSS
For dark mode: set data-theme="dark" on <html>.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Badge. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

count.description: Counter value. Count 0 hides counter badges.

max.description: Highest count shown before compacting to max+.

surface.description: Surface context used for the dot ring.

background.description: Direct ring background override for local surfaces.
